simmotiongmbh.text:
NEU BEI SIM-MOTION 🐀
Wir sind ab sofort offizieller Distributor der UK-Streetwear-Marke DIRTY RAT GARAGE.
Und der Beleg kommt direkt von der Bühne: Cass Lewis von Skunk Anansie – Bass in der Hand, Crowd bis zum Horizont, DRG auf der Brust.
Die ersten Shirts sind ab sofort in unserem Berliner Showroom vorrätig. 📍 Lietzenburger Str. 92, 10719 Berlin
Kommt vorbei, probiert an, nehmt mit. Stay dirty. 🖤
Fotos: Cass Lewis / Skunk Anansie
#dirtyratgarage  #SkunkAnansie #casslewis  #simmotion  #streetwear  ##berlín  #newinstock #cass_skunkanansie  #showroom

Schaut gerne mal vorbei, wir freuen uns auf euch!

#simracing #simmotion

🏁 TAG 2 in Berlin — und heute wird die Anreise belohnt!
Unsere Showroom-Eröffnung geht in die zweite Runde. Für alle, die einen weiten Weg zu uns machen, haben wir uns was überlegt:
🏆 Die 3 Besucher:innen mit der weitesten Anreise gewinnen einen Preis — präsentiert von unserem Partner @conspit_official!
Egal ob aus München, Hamburg, Wien oder Zürich — je weiter, desto besser. Sag uns einfach vor Ort, woher du kommst. 📍
🕙 Heute, 10–18 Uhr
📍 Lietzenburger Str. 92, 10719 Berlin
Komm vorbei, setz dich ins Cockpit und dreh ein paar Runden. Wir freuen uns auf dich!
#SimMotion #Conspit #SimRacing #Berlin #ShowroomOpening #SimRacingSetup #DirectDrive #Simagic #MozaRacing #Motorsport #Racing

O que dizem a esta personalização? 🔥

abruzziuk.text:
Built for every racer. Whether you're chasing lap times in the simulator or competing on the kart track, Abruzzi Custom Teamwear lets you represent yourself or your team in style. 🏁⁠
⁠
Our custom sim racing gloves and boots are designed to give sim racers the comfort, grip and premium look needed for long sessions behind the wheel. Personalise them with your own colours, logos and branding to create a setup that's uniquely yours.⁠
⁠
Taking things to the track? Our custom kart suits combine performance, comfort and standout design, making them the perfect choice for drivers looking to make an impression on race day.⁠
⁠
✔ Custom sim racing gloves & boots⁠
✔ Premium custom kart suits⁠
✔ Bespoke colours, logos & team branding⁠
✔ Designed for individuals, teams and esports organisations⁠
✔ High-quality craftsmanship throughout⁠
⁠
Whatever your discipline, Abruzzi has the custom teamwear to complete your look.⁠
⁠
Get in touch with our team or send us a DM to start designing yours today.⁠
⁠

simmotionus.text:
From Spokane to Virginia Tech 🏁

We’re incredibly proud to support Virginia Tech Motorsports as they begin building their program’s first simulator setup.

Watching the team unbox their new gear and take the first steps toward bringing this project to life is exactly why partnerships like this matter. Supporting the next generation of drivers, engineers, and motorsports innovators is something we’re so excited to be part of.

We can’t wait to see the full build come together and follow their journey from here. Huge thanks to the Virginia Tech Motorsports team for sharing these moments with us!

#SimMotion #VirginiaTech #FormulaSAE #SimRacing #Motorsports

SimNet SP Pro Loadcell Pedals are now in stock 🚨

Upgrade your Fanatec and Gran Turismo setup with pro-grade realism 🔥
— Fully adjustable feel
— Loadcell brake up to 100kg
— Optional haptics for full-tilt immersion

Connect to your Fanatec base via RJ12 or plug straight into PC.

Best suited for drivers who’ve outgrown entry-level pedals and want more brake consistency and adjustability. ⚡

#SimRacing #LoadcellPedals #FanatecUpgrade #GranTurismo #SimMotion #SimRigSetup #SimGear #SimNetSPPro

Built by sim racers, for sim racers.

At Sim Motion, we believe buying sim racing gear should come with real guidance, fast shipping, and support from people who actually know the hardware inside and out.

Whether you’re building your first setup or upgrading to your dream rig, our team is here to help you find the right gear for the way you drive.

Find your setup at the link in bio 🏁

#SimRacing #RacingSimulator #SimMotion #SimRacingGear #YourRigYourRules

nobaracingstore.text:
🔥 Así van las 10 Horas de Ecuador 🇪🇨🏁

De lo virtual a lo real.
Del simulador a la pista.
Un sueño que hoy ruge a toda velocidad.

Orgullo total por nuestro piloto Noba Daniel Vélez, @danvel37 por atreverse a dar el salto y demostrar que la pasión con disciplina sí abre caminos.

Esto no es solo una carrera.
Es el comienzo de algo grande. 🔥🏎️🚀

Ayer vivimos un momento que quedará grabado para siempre en la historia de Noba Racing Store. 🚀💛

Cumplimos el sueño de todo apasionado del automovilismo colombiano: ver a la leyenda @jpmonty2 , uno de los mejores pilotos de la historia, frente a frente… y aún más emocionante, verlo tomar el volante de nuestro simulador. 🏁✨

Pero la historia no terminó ahí. Gracias a la invitación de @podium_bc y a que @quimicolor_sas nos abrió las puertas de su casa, compartimos pista y sonrisas con @sebasmontoya58 , heredero del talento, la velocidad y la tenacidad que siguen llevando nuestra bandera a lo más alto de los podios del mundo. 🌎🏆

Gracias de corazón a @podium_bc y a @quimicolor_sas , patrocinador de Sebas, por hacer posible este encuentro soñado, que inspira a generaciones y enciende aún más nuestra pasión por el automovilismo.

Porque cuando la pasión por la velocidad nos une… no hay límites. 🏎💨

#nobaracingstore #juanpablomontoya #sebastiánmontoya #leyendasenlapista #simracingcolombia #pasiónporlavelocidad

🎮🔥 En Noba no solo vendemos simuladores…
Encendemos pasiones.

Ese instante en que tomas el volante, y todo desaparece…
La pista está frente a ti.
Tus reflejos, tu enfoque, tu pasión.
No es un juego… es vivir cada curva como si ya estuvieras ahí.

🏎️ En cada experiencia, en cada producto,
te acercamos un paso más a tu sueño de ser piloto.

⚡ Adrenalina real.
⚙️ Tecnología de alto nivel.
🏁 Emoción pura.

¿Estás listo para sentirlo?
¿Para dejar de imaginarlo y empezar a vivirlo?

🚀 Preventa exclusiva de Moza Racing.
Solo en Noba Racing Store.
Donde lo virtual deja de ser fantasía… y tu sueño de ser piloto empieza a ser realidad.

#simracing #mozaracing #sim #racing #moza #simrig #gamer #autos #simulator #racecars #driver #simulation

vipcbuilder.text:
Greetings Gamers!  Our event calendar for the June is up!

This month for any of you on the edge of jumping into the world of TCG's we have a learn to play day on the 6th starting at 11am kicking off with the Pokémon TCG until 1pm. Following that we will be education recently awakened Planeswalkers and slinging some spells in Magic: The Gathering until 3pm. Finally, choose your hero and slug it until the bitter end with the new classic Flesh and Blood until 5pm!

In Pokémon News this month we have a TBA event on the 13th and our usual ETB Battle on the 27th. 

It's a busy month for Planeswalkers this month in the world of Magic.  We have our Open the Archive Strixhaven Draft on the 7th, MTG's very own Pride event on the 14th where you can partner any two Legends, and MTG Marvel Super Heroes Prerelease weekend.

In the world of Rathe and Flesh and Blood we focusing our attention on Silver Age and ending the month with our Double Up Armory where you can win Armory and SAGE decks alike!

Game On!

 #fridaynightmagic #armorynight #FleshAndBloodTCG #lgs #pokemontcg #magicthegathering #pokémon

Howdy Gamers!
Don't mind the last slide, they just didn't fit on the first page but they are happy on their own.

On Planes of Magic its business as usual following a set release.  We have the God of Mischief commander event on the 18th and will have a Commander Party scheduled soon, be sure to check out events on our website to keep in the loop. 

In the Paradise of Pokémon we have PITCH BLACK on its way out.  Be sure to sign up for Pre-Prelease if you haven't.  Also we have a Team Format event scheduled so be sure to find a buddy and come on down cards in tow.

In the World of Rathe for you Flesh and Blood gamers it will be 3 weeks of Silver Age follow by our Classic Constructed Double Up at the end of the month.

The Trade enthusiasts out there will want to be there for our monthly Trade Day.  There may be new surprises in store this time around, the only way to find out is to come and see.

Thanks for reading if you made it this far. 
B.E out

🖤⚡ MEGA EVOLUTION: PITCH BLACK PRE-ORDERS ARE LIVE! ⚡🖤

The newest Pokémon TCG excitement is coming — and you can reserve yours now!

🔥 Limited stock
🔥 Collector favorites
🔥 New cards to chase

Pre-order today before supplies run out!

🌎Available now on our website

focussimracing.text:
FSR One Twenty.

Built for higher loads, increased rigidity, and precise adjustability.

Oversized 40×120 structural extrusion paired with CNC-machined connection points creates a chassis designed to minimize flex and maximize consistency.

CNC-indexed upright adjustment and a notched pedal system make dialing in your position simple and repeatable.

Every detail is engineered with purpose.

Built in California.

#simracing #simrig #losangeles

Meet the FSR Eighty.

The foundation of the Focus lineup.

Laser-cut steel. CNC-machined connection points. Built for rigidity where it matters most.

Designed for serious drivers—and built to grow with you.

Step up to the One Twenty when you’re ready for maximum rigidity.

Built in California. #simrig #simracing #losangeles

FSR One Sixty.

Built for maximum rigidity, higher loads, and precise repeatability.

Oversized 40×160 structural extrusion forms the foundation, paired with the Side Mount Pro system for a more rigid and stable wheelbase connection.

Indexed wheelbase height adjustment and a notched pedal system allow for fast, consistent setup changes without guesswork.

From structure to adjustment, every component is engineered to reduce flex and improve driver confidence.

Built in California.

#simracing #simrig #losangeles

overclockersuk.text:
20 years of ROG deserves something special... 🖤✨

To celebrate the milestone, ASUS unveiled a stunning black & gold Edition 20 collection at Computex 2026, turning some of its flagship hardware into true collector's pieces! 🏆💎

The line-up includes the ROG Crosshair X870E Edition 20, ROG Ryujin 360 Edition 20, ROG Astral RTX 5090 Edition 20, ROG Thor Titanium III Edition 20, ROG GR20 Edition 20, ROG Arcana DDR5 Edition 20, and more! 🤩

Can you imagine an entire PC built with these components... 🤯

Would you build with the Edition 20 range, or is it a bit too nice to ever take out of the box? 🤔

#ASUS #ROG #ROG20 #Computex2026 #PCBuild #CustomPC #GamingPC #PCHardware #PCMR #RTX5090 #Battlestation #GamingSetup #CollectorEdition #DreamSetup #ASUSROG

Could this be one of the smartest portable SSDs we've seen? 👀

At Computex 2026, ADATA showcased the new Urban Tapsafe, an external SSD that uses NFC to help keep your files secure. Just tap to unlock! 🙌

It's compact enough to take anywhere, and you can even customise the design to make it your own! ✈️✨

Simple, secure, and seriously clever. 🔒

@adata_global #ADATA #Computex2026 #ExternalSSD #DataStorage #DataSecurity #PCHardware #TechNews #PCGaming #PCSetup #PCMR #PortableSSD #TechGear #StorageSolutions #PCEnthusiast

This might be one of the best-looking motherboard designs we've ever seen... 🐉🔥

MSI's Draco Epic range made a huge impression at Computex 2026, but the real standout for us was the MEG ACE motherboard! 🤩

Whether you're building with AMD X870 or Intel Z890, you can get the same striking dragon-inspired design that's guaranteed to be the centrepiece of your build! ✨

So, the big question... would this be going straight into your next PC, or can you not handle the heat? 🧐🐉

@MSIgaming #MSI #MSIGaming #DracoEpic #Computex2026 #Motherboard #PCBuild #CustomPC #PCHardware #GamingPC #PCMR #Battlestation #GamingSetup #TechNews #DreamSetup #AMDvsIntel

befastracing.text:
Vive la adrenalina de las pistas desde casa 🏎️🔥
En Be Fast Racing tenemos los mejores productos de las marcas más top para que armes tu setup soñado 🎮⚡

👉 ¿Listo para ser parte de la comunidad Be Fast Racing? 🚦

#SimRacing #BeFastRacing #Simuladores #fyp #pcgaming

Lo que empezó como una pasión… hoy se convierte en algo histórico. 🏁

Nos llena de orgullo anunciar que somos distribuidores oficiales de Fanatec en México.

Después de años impulsando el simracing en el país, damos un paso que cambia todo: traer de manera oficial una de las marcas más importantes del mundo.

A partir de ahora, Fanatec tiene presencia oficial en México, con acceso directo a su ecosistema profesional, respaldo de marca, stock local, soporte y garantía en el país.

Esto marca un nuevo estándar:
mejores precios, más confianza, mejor experiencia y un verdadero siguiente nivel para el simracing en México.

No es solo una nueva etapa para nosotros.
Es un paso enorme para toda la comunidad.

Gracias por ser parte de este camino.

Hoy, Fanatec México es una realidad.

Bienvenidos al siguiente nivel.

Powered by Be Fast Racing.
befastracing.com

¡Atención amantes del SimRacing!

Conoce algunas de las marcas que tenemos disponibles, desde las más reconocidas hasta las que están marcando tendencia, ¡todas están aquí!

Compra con confianza y seguridad, No te arriesgues con tiendas poco confiables. Nosotros te respaldamos en todo momento y además hacemos válida cualquier garantía.

 ¡No te pierdas esta oportunidad de adquirir productos de las mejores marcas a precios increíbles!

Visita befastracing.com y descubre todas las marcas que tenemos disponibles. Si tienes alguna duda o necesitas ayuda en tu compra, nuestro equipo está listo para ayudarte.

¡Gracias por confiar en nosotros! #BeFast

simking_eu.text:
Feeling Tokyo Drift right from your living room? It's possible 🔥

Thought motion actuators were only for hardcore racing simulators? Think again.

SIMRIG motion actuators are compatible with Forza Horizon 6 telemetry. Every jump, every kerb, every drift, and every burst of acceleration through the streets of Japan is instantly translated into your cockpit.

⚡ Why it's the ultimate combo:

🔵 Compact and ultra-quiet actuators, perfect for home use.
🔵 Lightning-fast response for total immersion in an open-world environment.
🔵 An unbeatable performance-to-price ratio for stepping into motion simulation.

Don't just admire the world of FH6, drive it. 🏎️💨

Take your setup to the next level with motion, link in bio 🔗

#SimRacing #Simrig #ForzaHorizon6 #FH6 #MotionRig #SimRacer #JDM #TokyoDrift #SimRacingSetup #GamingSetup #SetupSimracing #ChassisDynamique

🇫🇷 Tu débutes dans le simracing ?

Voici un premier setup idéal pour s’équiper avec du matériel accessible et haut de gamme, pensé pour progresser dans les meilleures conditions 👌

🟢 Cockpit Next Level Racing GT Lite Pro
🟢 Base MOZA Racing R9 V3
🟢 Volant MOZA Racing ESX (compatible Xbox)
🟢 Pédalier MOZA Racing SRP

🎄 Et pourquoi pas s’équiper après Noël ?

💬 Une question ou besoin de conseils ?
N’hésite pas à nous contacter !

🇺🇸🇬🇧 New to sim racing?

Here’s an ideal first setup to get equipped with accessible yet high-end gear, designed to help you progress in the best conditions 👌

🟢 Next Level Racing GT Lite Pro cockpit
🟢 MOZA Racing R9 V3 wheel base
🟢 MOZA Racing ESX wheel (Xbox compatible)
🟢 MOZA Racing SRP pedal set

🎄 Why not gear up after Christmas?

💬 Got a question or need advice?
Feel free to contact us!

#Simracing #MozaRacing #NextLevelRacing #F1 #Xbox #DirectDrive #RacingSetup #Simracer #GamingSetup

Tester avant d’acheter ?

Nos experts vous accueillent sur rendez-vous dans un espace de 100 m² dédié au simracing et à la simulation de vol, dans notre showroom situé entre Aix-en-Provence et Marseille.

Sur place, on prend le temps d’échanger sur votre pratique, vos attentes et votre budget, puis on vous fait tester différentes configurations.

Simulateurs 3DOF et 4DOF, Direct Drive, pédaliers haut de gamme, cockpits et flight sim…
Vous testerez du matériel MOZA Racing, Heusinkveld et NextLevelRacing, Simrig, D-Box, Dof Reality... principalement sur PC.

📍 À proximité de Marseille
📆 Visites uniquement sur rendez-vous
💬 Intéressé(e) par une visite ? Dites-le en commentaire et partagez !

racegeareu.text:
Czech SimRacing Series 2025 - Grand Final in Prague: 𝐃𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐃𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝

The Grand Final of the Czech SimRacing Series 2025 at the @praguecarfestival delivered extremely close racing, strong performances and a professional atmosphere across both categories – Czech National and International.
Thank you to all drivers for clean battles, discipline and a highly competitive level throughout the entire event.

Finals Results - 1st to 8th

1. David Tóth
2. Martin Tóth
3. Angelo Michel
4. Jan Haladej
5. Lukáš Přáda
6. Erwin Liszkowicz
7. Balazs Palla
8. Marcell Morocz

9th to 16th Semi Finals:

Kevin Aebi
Stebler Dylan
Samuel Foniok
František Kaštovský
Adam Vařeka
Gázser Gergő Marcell
Sergio Gurdiel Ferreiro
Adam Celárek

17th to 28th (Elimination Stage):

Drivers in this group advanced through a demanding Time Attack. The field was very close this year, and reaching the Top 28 required real consistency.

Milan Šádek
Oliver Gmuca
Lukáš Uhlík
Petr Hermoch
Mees Ketelaar
Jacopo Hrynečko
David Bieroš
Sophia Papáyová
Kristýna Dytrtová
František Vala
Lukáš Vysoký
Sebastian Bobek

𝐁𝐢𝐠 𝐓𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐤 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐨 𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐬:

@moza_racing_official – for providing the R12 Direct Drive bases and FSR 2.0 formula steering wheels
Křenek Motorsport & @racingfuel_simulators – for generous prizes and technical support
@simucube – for excellent prizes
@aditis_racing, @praguecarfestival and @racing.journal for their support and contribution
@opggfi 

Special Thanks – @pavel_fab, @autoklubcr & @fiawec_official

We extend our sincere appreciation to Autoklub České republiky and FIA for their guidance and support throughout the season. Their involvement helped ensure a professional, fair and internationally aligned competition.

Thanks to Organising Team

Our big thanks also go to everyone involved in the event’s execution: 
Organizators: @racegeareu
Commentators: @pavel_fab & @joshuax_cz 
Event directors: @martinsirotek_simracer & Josef Křenek
Technical staff: @petr_simecka & @matty.g.11
Stewards: @martiin_kadlecik & @fiala.vojtech
Production crew: @proesportcz & @lukas.redl
Media staff: @nkcsoka & @lukasv.raw

#CzechSimRacingSeries #Simracing #Motorsport #esport

Ukázka high-end SimRacingového rigu dodaného pod vánoční stromeček firmou @racegeareu r našemu velkému klientovi do Brna.

Jednalo se o kompletní profesionální stavbu od a do z. Od úvodních konzultací, přes detailní výběr komponent včetně počítače a monitoru, po složení, instalaci, dovoz, zapojení na místě a následný couching. Jednoduše řečeno all-incusive služba.

Na rigu byli použity pouze komponenty nejvyšší kvality, podrobný list níže:

Volantová základna - @simucube  2 Pro 
Pedály - @simucube aktivní pedály (plyn ve variantě Pro, brzda ve variantě Ultimate) 
Konstrukce kokpitu - @opggfi OverPower GT Pro verze včetně elektrického posuvu pedálu, držáku PC, klávesnice a myši
GT volanty - Karbonový @rexingsteeringwheels GT volant Timun & @simucube Tahko kulatý černý volant
Formulové volanty - @ascher.racing McLaren Artura Pro & @rexingsteeringwheels Mayaris 2
Sedačka včetně držáku a pojezdu -@sparco_official Evo L s příslušenstvím
PC - high-end s grafickou kartou Nvidia RTX4080 (počítáno s upgradem na RTX5090)
Hlavní monitor - Super ultrawide Samsung Neo 57 palců 240Hz
Dashboard monitor - Dell 27 palců 165Hz
Reproduktory pro diváky - SteelSeries Arena 3

Celá stavba byla mířená k simulaci různých modelů vozů Porsche. V tuto chvíli je to základ, který bude expandovat dál skrze velice zajímavé komponenty právě s tématikou Porsche.

Projekt byl náročný, ale také velice zábavný, posuďte stavbu alespoň na fotkách sami :). 

Presentation of high-end SimRacing rig delivered for Christmas by @racegear company to our big client to Brno city in Czech republic.

Setup with its components is visible above.

It was a complete design and build of the rig from a to z. From vision, over consultation to detail pick of all components including PC and monitor to actual build, installation, delivery, establishment with following couching. Simply said all-inclusive service.

It was demanding project, but real fun, you can review it at least from the photos yourself :).

Thanks for support!

#weneverstoplookingforgap #thisisourworld #simucube #racegeareu #simracing #simracinghardware #esport

🏁 Proud to be Official Distributor

We’re proud to announce that RaceGear is an official distributor of @bavariansimtec.

Their steering wheels represent absolute top-tier German engineering, precision and uncompromising quality — and we’re excited to bring them directly to our customers.

Including the brand new Delta Pro SC, the first fully wireless display wheel for Simucube 3 bases, a wide selection of Bavarian SimTec products is now available in our shop — with many models in stock and ready to ship.

🛒 Available at:
👉 https://www.racegear.eu

Thank you to @bavariansimtec  for the trust. Looking forward to a strong partnership. 🤝

#RaceGear #BavarianSimTec #SimRacing #OfficialDistributor #GermanEngineering

Bienvenido a la familia Simufy Diego 🧡 

#simufy #rally #simracing #motorsport #simrig

Este año @ferminaldeguer_54 se ha portado muy bien

Rookie del Año de MotoGP 2025 🏆
Temporada de nivel. Ritmo, talento y trabajo constante

Así que Papá Noel lo tenía claro:
🎁 Su regalo más deseado tenía que estar a la altura

Un simulador exclusivo y totalmente personalizado, montado a medida para el piloto de @gresiniracing, pensado para que en el parón entre temporadas pueda seguir compitiendo: entrenar, desconectar, echarle horas… y picarse como si estuviera en pista 😏

Gracias por confiar en nosotros con un simulador que no es solo para disfrutar, sino para mantener el ritmo, afinar sensaciones y seguir mejorando incluso cuando no hay carreras

Esto es entrenar de verdad, también fuera del circuito

tracksvr.text:
Meet TVR GALAXY, where sim racing goes beyond the limits. 

Built for drivers chasing a new orbit of performance, this full race-ready simulator combines premium hardware with complete assembly, testing, and calibration so you can strap in and launch straight into the action.

Featuring:
🏎️ Heusinkveld Ultimate Pedals
🏎️ Conspit 20Nm Wheelbase + MAX-01 Wheel
🏎️ 160mm Chassis
🏎️ 6 Sigma MiMotion 4 DOF Motion System
🏎️ NRG Seat
🏎️ Triple Screen Setup + Monitor Mount
🏎️ Software, speakers, keyboard, USB hub & power bars
🏎️ Technical Service Package included

Every lap becomes its own universe. Every apex feels closer. Precision, motion, and immersion aligned to put you in the driver’s seat of something out of this world.

TVR GALAXY, built to take your racing experience into another dimension.

#tracksvr #racing #simracing #yyc

Watching Thaden Van Wong take on our new TVR GALAXY Racing Simulator Pushing the limits, chasing lap times, and putting the experience to the test.

#yyc #tracksvr #calgary #racing #simracing

noxgaming.ca.text:
With Resident Evil 9 releasing tomorrow, we couldn't resist building a killer PC inspired by the franchise: a white ASUS ROG Astral NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090, a Ryzen 7 9850X3D, 96GB of RGB DDR5 RAM, an 8TB PCIe 5.0 NVMe SSD, and a TRYX Panorama liquid CPU cooler with its AMOLED display.

Huge thanks, Mick, for your order!

Avec la sortie de Resident Evil 9 demain, on ne pouvais pas s'empêcher de ous sortir un beau PC pour la franchise. Avec une Asus ROG Astral NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 blanche, un Ryzen 7 9850X3D, 96GB de RAM DDR5 RGB, 8TB de NVMe SSD 5.0 et un refroidisseur de processeur liquide TRYX Panorama avec son écran AMOLED.

Un gros merci Mick pour ta commande!

#ResidentEvilRequiem #pcmr #pcmasterrace #residentevil #residentevilpc #gamingpc

Salut, nous c’est NOX Gaming. 🔥

Notre mission? Assembler l’ordinateur de tes rêves. Celui qui répondra à TOUS tes besoins en matière de gaming. 🕹️
 
Pour rendre ton expérience avec nous hyper simple et accessible, on offre des options de financement + des conseils personnalisés, pour que tu vives l’expérience gaming de ta vie. 
 
En nous suivant sur les réseaux sociaux, tu auras droit à:
✔ Des conseils pour faire les meilleurs choix en matière de setup
✔ Tout ce qu’il faut pour être au courant des tendances de l’heure
✔ De l’inspiration, car on te partagera différents setups de feu, montés par notre belle communauté
 
Bienvenue au paradis du gaming. 👾
 
Abonne toi pour ne pas manquer le lancement de notre site web! 

_____
 
 
Hi, we're NOX Gaming. 🔥

Our mission? To assemble the computer of your dreams. The one that will meet ALL your gaming needs. 🕹️
 
To make your experience with us extra simple and accessible, we offer financing options + personalized advice, so you can have the gaming experience of a lifetime. 
 
By following us on social media, you'll get:
✔ Advice on making the best setup choices
✔ Everything you need to know about the latest trends
✔ Inspiration, as we'll share with you amazing setups by our beautiful community
 
Welcome to gaming heaven. 👾
 
Follow us to make sure you won't miss the upcoming launch of our website!

🏎️ This weekend, July 10–12, come visit us at Canadian Tire Motorsport Park at Bowmanville for the Chevrolet Grand Prix IMSA.! We'll have a racing simulator on site featuring a VERO Motion system, delivering an even more realistic driving experience that you can try by yourself!

Don't miss this opportunity to experience the thrill of racing!

----------

🏎️ Venez nous voir ce weekend, du 10 au 12 juillet, au Canadian Tire Motosport Park à Bowmanville pour le Chevrolet Grand Prix de IMSA. Vous pourrez faire l’essai d’un simulateur de course équipé d’un système VERO Motion pour encore plus de réalisme! 

Ne ratez pas cette occasion de vivre des émotions fortes!

#simracing #imsa #noxgaming #veromotion

simline.gt.text:

The promotion applies to all Simnet gear available on our website – from heavy-duty hydraulic handbrakes, sequential shifters, and "iFlag" displays, to advanced pedal sets and haptics designed specifically for them.

If you are currently building a simulator or planning a simrig upgrade, see what Simnet has in store for you.

📩 You can find all available Simnet products via the link in the first comment. Head over to our website and take your precision and driving pleasure to the next level!
#simnet #simline #promotions #simracingdeal # #simracingsale 
@simnetracing 

Sprawdżcie świeże promocje na Simnet, znajdziecie je na naszym sklepie simline i zaoszędzicie do 10 %!

Promocja dotyczy całego sprzętu od Simnet, który znajdziecie na naszej stronie simline – od pancernych hydraulicznych ręcznych, przez sekwencyjne shiftery, wyświetlacze "iFlag" aż po zaawansowane zestawy pedałów i zaprojektowaną specjalnie dla nich haptykę.

Jeśli akurat budujesz symulator lub planujesz upgrade swojego simriga sprawdź czy Simnet ma coś ciekawego dla Ciebie.

📩 Wszystkie dostępne produkty Simnet znajdziecie pod linkiem w pierwszym komentarzu. Wpadajcie na stronę i wejdźcie na wyższy poziom precyzji i przyjemności z jazdy!

When you cross over into high-end gear, your sim rig has no limits. You're building a dream setup where your imagination is the only bottleneck - sky is the limit. 🏁

Our wheels routinely land in the most uncompromising, heavy-duty builds worldwide. Case in point? The Simline AMG GT3.

This isn't just another wheel. It’s a raw replica of the steering wheel from the Mercedes GT3—the exact one Max Verstappen used to fight for every millisecond during the grueling 24-hour race on the legendary Nürburgring Nordschleife, the Green Hell.

If you're hunting for realism with zero compromises and want to feel exactly what real-world racing drivers feel through their hands—you’re in the right place.

Building your ultimate rig? Click the link in the comments and see what the Simline AMG GT3 can do. 🏎️💨

#simracing #simline #amggt3 #mercedesamg #nurburgring24h #verstappen 
maxverstappen1

Gdy wjeżdżasz w sprzęt klasy high-end, Twój simrig przestaje mieć jakiekolwiek ograniczenia. Budujesz stanowisko marzeń, gdzie jedynym hamulcem jest wyobraźnia. 🏁

Nasze kierownice regularnie lądują w najbardziej bezkompromisowych, potężnych projektach na świecie. Doskonały przykład? Simline AMG GT3.

To nie jest zwykłe kółko. To bezkompromisowa replika kierownicy z Mercedesa klasy GT3 – dokładnie tego, którym Max Verstappen walczył o każdą sekundę podczas morderczego, 24-godzinnego wyścigu na legendarnym torze Nürburgring Nordschleife - zielonym piekle.

Jeśli szukasz realizmu bez pół środków i chcesz poczuć na własnych rękach to, co czują kierowcy w prawdziwym motorsporcie – jesteś we właściwym miejscu.

Budujesz rig życia? Klikaj w link w komentarzu i zobacz, co potrafi Simline AMG GT3. 🏎️💨

🔥Our current bestseller - the Mercedes GT3 AMG steering wheel. 
Today, it was shipped to another two customers. 

⬇️Check out the link below the post and find out why it is chosen for our customers' sim rigs.🔗

#Simline #MercedesGT3 #AMG #Simracing #SimRig #Bestseller #RacingWheel 

🔥Nasz obecny bestseller - kierownica Mercedes GT3 AMG. 
Dzisiaj została wysłana do kolejnych dwóch klientów.

⬇️Wpadnijcie do linku pod postem i sprawdźcie dlaczego jest wybierana do simrigów naszych klientów.🔗

Take a quick tour of our 4000sq ft. showroom and explore a full range of simulation rigs, from entry-level to high-end configurations. We offer multiple brands of steering wheels, wheelbases, pedals, motion platforms, monitors, high-performance PCs, and all the accessories you need.

Beginner, a casual driver, a sim enthusiast, or a professional racer, we can customize the perfect setup for any discipline: racing, rally, truck, flight, and more.

We’re not just a walkin retail shop, we provide personalized consultations to ensure you get the right product and a setup that performs exactly as you need.

Book an appointment to try different configurations and discover what best suits you, from leisure to training. From kids to adults to real racing drivers, everyone’s welcome.
